task_completion.description: Create a forensic case named 'JPEG_Catalog_2024' with case number 'INV-JPEG-002'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Autopsy GUI (or similar forensic software) displaying the active case name 'JPEG_Catalog_2024' and case number 'INV-JPEG-002' in the title bar, case properties, or dashboard.

task_completion.description: Add the disk image '/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd' to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd' listed under 'Data Sources' in the forensic software's tree view or data source manager.

task_completion.description: Identify JPEG files (allocated and carved) and calculate their MD5 hashes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file listing or search results in the forensic software showing JPEG files (e.g., under 'Views' -> 'File Types' -> 'Images' or 'Deleted Files'), with a column visible for MD5 hashes.

task_completion.description: Generate a tab-delimited catalog at '/home/ga/Reports/jpeg_catalog.tsv' with specific columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, spreadsheet viewer, or terminal output displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/jpeg_catalog.tsv'. It must contain the header row: 'FILENAME', 'FULL_PATH', 'SIZE_BYTES', 'MD5_HASH', and 'ALLOCATED', followed by rows of data.

task_completion.description: Write a summary file to '/home/ga/Reports/jpeg_catalog_summary.txt' with specific counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/jpeg_catalog_summary.txt'. It must contain exactly the lines 'TOTAL_JPEG_FILES: <N>', 'ALLOCATED_FILES: <N>', and 'CARVED_UNALLOCATED: <N>' where <N> are numbers.

integrity.description: The agent used actual forensic software (like Autopsy) to analyze the disk image rather than just guessing or fabricating the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Autopsy GUI or other legitimate forensic tools actively processing or displaying the contents of 'jpeg_search.dd'.

integrity.description: The catalog TSV contains realistic file data derived from the image, not placeholder text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the TSV file contents for actual filenames, realistic file paths, valid MD5 hashes (32-character hex strings), and 'Y'/'N'/'N/A' in the ALLOCATED column.

integrity.description: The summary file contains actual calculated numbers, not the literal placeholder '<N>'.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the summary file has actual integers (e.g., 'TOTAL_JPEG_FILES: 15') instead of 'TOTAL_JPEG_FILES: <N>'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires the agent to use Autopsy (or a similar forensic tool) to create a case named 'JPEG_Catalog_2024' (Case Number: 'INV-JPEG-002') and analyze the disk image '/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd'. The agent must output two files: a TSV catalog at '/home/ga/Reports/jpeg_catalog.tsv' containing headers FILENAME, FULL_PATH, SIZE_BYTES, MD5_HASH, ALLOCATED, and a summary file at '/home/ga/Reports/jpeg_catalog_summary.txt' containing specific count lines.
